debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
m R : NNReal
hr : R ≠ 0
⊢ centerOfMass (RigidBody.solidSphere d.succ m R) = 0

failed_attempts: simpa [centerOfMass, solidSphere] using (solidSphere d.succ m R).centerOfMass_eq_zero_of_origin_symm

simpa using (solidSphere d.succ m R).centerOfMass_eq_zero_of_isometry
    (fun x => -x) (by
      intro x
      simp) (by
      intro x
      simp [Metric.closedBall, neg_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]) hr

simpa [RigidBody.centerOfMass, solidSphere, hr] using
    (RigidBody.centerOfMass_origin_of_radial_density (d := d.succ)
      (ρ := fun x : Space d.succ =>
        m / volume.real (Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R)) (R := R) hr)

simpa [RigidBody.centerOfMass, solidSphere] using
    (RigidBody.centerOfMass_eq_zero_of_radial (B := Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R)
      (m := m) (R := R) hr)

simpa [solidSphere, centerOfMass, hr] using
    (solidSphere d.succ m R).centerOfMass_eq_zero_of_isSymmetric (by
      simpa using Metric.isSymmetric_closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R)

simpa [RigidBody.centerOfMass, solidSphere] using
    (RigidBody.centerOfMass_eq_zero_of_isometry_invariant
      (B := solidSphere d.succ m R)
      (by
        intro φ hφ
        ext f
        simp [solidSphere, hφ])
      (by
        intro v hv
        ext f
        simp [solidSphere, hv]))
simpa using (solidSphere_centerOfMass (d := d) (m := m) (R := R) hr)
simpa [RigidBody.centerOfMass, solidSphere] using (solidSphere (d := d.succ) m R).centerOfMass_eq_zero

simpa [RigidBody.centerOfMass, solidSphere] using
    (RigidBody.centerOfMass_eq_zero_of_isClosedBall_origin (d := d.succ) (m := m) (R := R) hr)

classical
  simpa [RigidBody.centerOfMass, solidSphere] using (by
    ext i
    simp)
